name: atlas-auto-morocco
description: Monorepo : npm run dev à la racine démarre l’API (4000) + le site (3000).

scripts.dev: npx --yes concurrently@9 -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "sh -c 'sleep 5 && npm run dev:frontend'"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:push --prefix backend && npm run db:seed --prefix backend
